docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, TWILA MAE AKA TWILA WILLIAMS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, TWILA MAE AKA TWILA WILLIAMS $2,541.13 PRINCIPAL, $2,413.04 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,954.17, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE 	28513 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED SEP-22-1997, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, TWILA MAE AKA TWILA WILLIAMS
